_info: Zentrale Settings-Datei fuer alle Scraper. Jede Sektion entspricht einem Scraper im Dashboard. Aenderungen hier ueberschreiben die Einzel-Dateien.

card_price_scraper._comment: FALLBACK ONLY. Primaere Preisquelle ist der Cardmarket Price Merger ([14]). Filter (in Reihenfolge): (1) min_set: ueberspringe Sets aelter als dieses Set laut sets.json (z.B. 'TEF' = aktuelle Standard-Rotation). Leerstring '' = aus. (2) only_update_sets: optionale Whitelist von Set-Codes; [] = alle. (3) skip_cardmarket_mapped: ueberspringe alle Karten, die bereits in data/cardmarket_id_mapping.csv stehen. Standard-Setup (TEF + skip_cardmarket_mapped) bedeutet: Limitless scraped nur unmapped Karten in Standard-Sets — typisch eine Handvoll Lueckenfueller pro Lauf.

current_meta_analysis._comment: Combines Limitless Online (Meta Live) and Play! (Meta Play!). append_mode=true keeps old data and only adds new entries.

city_league_analysis._comment: Scrapes City League tournaments and extracts card data by archetype. append_mode=true keeps old tournament dates when adding new data. additional_tournament_ids: Add tournament IDs from main site (e.g., Champions League) - format: [547, 550]

labs_tournament_scraper._comment: from_date: YYYY-MM-DD. tournament_types: regional/international/special/worlds. overwrite: true replaces CSV instead of appending.

online_tournament_scraper._comment: Predictor 2.0 source. format_filter must be the live set code (POR / PFL / etc.). 50/50 time-weighting: recent_days_high_weight days = recent_weight, older = older_weight. Pulls only tournaments >= min_players; output sorted by total_brought_weighted desc.

tournament_JH._comment: Scrapes individual deck lists from all tournaments. max_tournaments=150 for complete coverage. delay=0 for speed. WICHTIG: Scraping dauert ca. 0.3-0.5 Minuten pro Turnier.
